final:
module top_module(
    input clk, // clock signal
    input clr, // clear signal
    input rst, // reset signal
    input up, // up signal
    input load, // load signal
    input [7:0] din, // data input signal
    input en, // enable signal
    output reg [4:0] op // output signal
);reg [4:0] cnt; // counter

always @ (posedge clk) begin
    if (clr) begin
        cnt <= 5'b0; // clear counter to 0
    end else if (rst) begin
        cnt <= din[4:0]; // reset counter to initial value
    end else if (load) begin
        cnt <= din[4:0]; // load initial value into counter
    end else if (en) begin
        if (up) begin
            cnt <= cnt + 5'b1; // cnt up
        end else begin
            cnt <= cnt - 5'b1; // cnt down
        end
    end
end

assign op = cnt; // assign output signal to counter value

endmodule
